steps.name: Verify the login page is open
$("by text: Log into Your Account") should be(visible)
Verify the projects page is open
Verify the projects page is open
Create project 'Bauch Group' with multiple suites support
Verify the project creation form is open
$("by text: Successfully added the new project.") should be(visible)
Verify the projects page is open
Go to Test Suites & Cases section
$("by text: Add Test Suite") should be(visible)
$("[data-testid='editSectionDescription'] .fr-element[contenteditable='true']") send keys(Possimus molestias dolorum adipisci provident.)

parameters.name: suite
parameters.value: Suite(name=Suite_repudiandae, description=Possimus molestias dolorum adipisci provident.)

steps.name: Verify the suite is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test suite")
Add test case 'Aut ab voluptatem necessitatibus est.' to suite
Verify the test case creation form is open
Create test case 'Aut ab voluptatem necessitatibus est.'
$("[data-testid='addEditCaseTitle']") set value(Aut ab voluptatem necessitatibus est.)

parameters.name: testCase
parameters.value: TestCase(title=Aut ab voluptatem necessitatibus est., section=, template=, type=, priority=)

parameters.name: testCase
parameters.value: TestCase(title=Aut ab voluptatem necessitatibus est., section=, template=, type=, priority=)

steps.name: Verify the test case is created successfully
$("with text: Successfully added the new test case.") should be(visible)
Go to Test Runs & Results section
Open the test run creation form

parameters.name: run
parameters.value: TestRun(name=Run_explicabo, description=Veniam dolorum distinctio sunt error.)

steps.name: Verify the test run is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test run")
Go to Test Runs & Results section
Open the test run creation form

parameters.name: run
parameters.value: TestRun(name=Run_ut, description=Quos autem esse voluptas rem explicabo.)

steps.name: Verify the test run is created successfully
$("[data-testid='messageSuccessDivBox']") should have(text "Successfully added the new test run")
Open the 'Comparison for Cases' report template
Select suite 'Suite_repudiandae' and all project runs for comparison
